name: Kinkajou
description:
Update 1.1: art changed to the art made by @Toastytheproto

Here is this silly yellow bean! she is one of my favorite characters so I hope you don't be a freak but I cannot control what you do anyways. But just for y'all I will make a different opening for each tribe!

1: Nightwing

2: Sandwing

3: Icewing

4: seawing

5: skywing

6: mudwing
